---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Tsonik
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Use Case
Describe the specific use case this feature would address. How would it be used in practice?

## Current Workaround
Is there a current way to achieve similar functionality? Describe any workarounds you're currently using.

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas about how this feature might be implemented, please share them here.

## API Example
If applicable, provide an example of how you envision the API for this feature:

```typescript
// Example code showing how the feature might be used
const result = await client.resource.newFeatureMethod({
  param1: 'value',
  param2: true
});
```

## Related Iconik API Documentation
If this relates to specific Iconik API endpoints, please provide links to their documentation.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
